mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM students
is_deleted = false
AND full_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{fullName}, '%')
AND full_name_kana LIKE CONCAT('%', #{fullNameKana}, '%')
AND residence_area LIKE CONCAT('%', #{residenceArea}, '%')

SELECT * FROM students_courses
AND course LIKE CONCAT('%', #{course}, '%')

SELECT * FROM course_status
AND status LIKE CONCAT('%', #{status}, '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO students (full_name, full_name_kana, nickname, mail_address, residence_area, age, sex, remark) VALUES (#{fullName}, #{fullNameKana}, #{nickname}, #{mailAddress}, #{residenceArea}, #{age}, #{sex}, #{remark})
INSERT INTO students_courses (student_id, course, start_date, end_date) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{course}, #{startDate}, #{endDate})

INSERT INTO course_status (course_id, status, provisional_application_date, application_date,cancel_date) VALUES (#{courseId},#{status}, #{provisionalApplicationDate}, #{applicationDate}, #{cancelDate})
mapper.update: UPDATE students SET full_name = #{fullName}, full_name_kana = #{fullNameKana}, nickname = #{nickname}, mail_address = #{mailAddress}, residence_area = #{residenceArea}, age = #{age}, sex = #{sex}, remark = #{remark}, is_deleted = #{isDeleted} WHERE student_id = #{studentId}

UPDATE course_status SET course_id = #{courseId}, status = #{status}, provisional_application_date = #{provisionalApplicationDate}, application_date = #{applicationDate}, cancel_date = #{cancelDate} WHERE course_status_id = #{courseStatusId}
